title: ATTICUS current working baseline across AMAS and MPO
content: The current ATTICUS working baseline is defined by AMAS as the governance anchor and ATTICUS_MPO release-candidate as the active implementation baseline. AMAS is represented as v2.0-draft with explicit separation between governance core, runtime binding, and conformance profiles. ATTICUS_MPO release-candidate now includes both PR #99 (context-carrying memory cells) and PR #100 (query-aware retrieval hints), which together define the current memory-engine baseline for bounded long-term continuity and retrieval quality.
context_summary: Durable cross-repo working-baseline cell for ATTICUS. Encodes the current AMAS governance anchor plus the current MPO implementation baseline after merged PRs #99 and #100.
